description: Labeled diff scenarios for the pr-review skill. Each case lists the findings a correct review must produce. A regression = an expected finding stops being produced, or the clean case starts producing findings.

expected_findings.reason: real token inlined in a versioned file

cases.name: os-getenv-outside-config
cases.diff: weather.py: added `api_key = os.getenv('WEATHER_API_KEY')` inside get_weather_data instead of receiving it from Settings

cases.name: request-without-timeout
cases.diff: weather.py: new aiohttp session.get(url, params=params) with no ClientTimeout

expected_findings.reason: network call without a timeout can hang the loop

cases.name: behavior-change-no-test
cases.diff: formatting.py: rain_probability formula changed; no test added or updated

expected_findings.reason: changed behavior with no covering test

cases.name: clean-add-config-var
cases.diff: config.py adds UNITS with a default; documented in .env.example and README; test_config covers default + override
